images.alt: Layered surreal wilderness portrait of a serene woman in a flowing ivory chiffon gown standing beside a tranquil lake in a northern pine forest, her figure partially dissolving into mist and reflections so she blends ethereally into the environment. Multiple horizontal layers of the landscape repeat like dreamlike stacked realities — calm mirror-lakes, foggy evergreen forests, and distant moose standing in shallow water appearing across the layers. Soft morning mist drifting through the scene, reflections of mountains and trees extending downward through the layered planes. The woman appears semi-transparent in places, her gown flowing like fog merging with the landscape. Golden hour light, tranquil atmosphere, Fujifilm medium-format film aesthetic, natural color science, ultra-detailed photorealism, cinematic composition, deep depth of field across all layers, ethereal surreal photography.
